summary: Verified US-843 AI component regression for legal, context-aware decisions and auto-turn diagnostics. Spexus current_context was read before task and epic context. Dependency reports PERSONAL-TASK-1147 through PERSONAL-TASK-1150 were present and reviewed. Source inspection of src/ai/heuristicAi.ts confirms chooseAiAction always derives from getLegalActions, throws contextual diagnostics when no legal actions exist, and uses phase/context-specific heuristics for bidding, contract ordering, discard, whist/check/pass, contract play, all-pass, misere, settlement, and next-deal. Unit and integration tests verify representative AI choices are legal and applyAction-compatible, not merely first-action fallback, and preserve MZ-304 diagnostics. Targeted AI regression and npm run verify both passed. This app is a static Vite/localStorage browser game with no backend, live API, auth, server persistence, or production telemetry pipeline in scope.

tests_run.evidence: No project virtualenv activation file exists in the requested worktree; verification continued with package.json Node scripts.

tests_run.command: npm run test -- src/ai/heuristicAi.test.ts src/test/aiDecision.integration.test.ts src/test/integrationHarness.test.ts
tests_run.evidence: Vitest reported 3 files passed and 13 tests passed, covering heuristic AI unit scenarios, AI decision integration scenarios, and deterministic harness behavior.
Vitest reported 12 files passed and 111 tests passed; tsc and vite production build completed successfully.

node_package_scripts.verify: npm run test && npm run build

verification_environment.project_scope_note: Static Vite browser MVP; no backend/live API/auth/scope/server persistence applies. Browser storage is localStorage only. No API interception paths were found in the inspected AI/test files.

quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Dependency reports were reviewed at the exact paths supplied by the verifier prompt; current source and fresh commands were used for final acceptance.

quality_gate_matrix.command_or_source: npm run test -- src/ai/heuristicAi.test.ts src/test/aiDecision.integration.test.ts src/test/integrationHarness.test.ts
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Deterministic local unit/integration coverage is representative across phase fixtures and not exhaustive over all seeds, hands, and legal action orderings.
Local deterministic test/build verification only; no backend or live service exists for this app.

quality_gate_matrix.command_or_source: src/ai/heuristicAi.ts buildNoLegalActionsMessage; src/test/integrationHarness.ts buildHarnessFailureMessage; src/ai/heuristicAi.test.ts; src/test/aiDecision.integration.test.ts; task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1150/attempt-1.json
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Observability is actionable thrown-error/test/development output with seed, phase, actor, legal set, chosen action, and trace context. There is no production telemetry sink in MVP scope.

quality_gate_matrix.command_or_source: PERSONAL-EP-180 hierarchy; package.json; src/test/integrationHarness.ts; src/test/aiDecision.integration.test.ts; rg scan for page.route/route.fulfill/MSW/fake server
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: The app has no backend/live API/auth/scope/server persistence path. Browser localStorage persistence exists elsewhere in the static app, but US-843 AI regression does not introduce server persistence or auth behavior.

The scan reported no API/browser route interception harness. It did find deterministic fixture references in local tests, so evidence is classified as local unit/integration/regression rather than live_browser or live_api.

evidence_matrix.scenario: AI chooses only one action from the legal action set returned by the rules engine.
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: src/ai/heuristicAi.ts chooseAiAction/getLegalActions source review; src/ai/heuristicAi.test.ts legality matrix; npm run test -- src/ai/heuristicAi.test.ts src/test/aiDecision.integration.test.ts src/test/integrationHarness.test.ts
evidence_matrix.limitations: Unit-level representative phase fixtures, not exhaustive over all possible hands and seeds.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Representative AI choices are accepted by applyAction without throwing across bidding, contract order, widow pickup, discard, whist, all-pass play, misere play, contract play, deal settlement, and next-deal states.
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: src/test/aiDecision.integration.test.ts chooseAiAction plus applyAction matrix; npm run test -- src/ai/heuristicAi.test.ts src/test/aiDecision.integration.test.ts src/test/integrationHarness.test.ts; npm run verify
evidence_matrix.limitations: This is in-process project integration through the real domain engine and rules code; no backend/live API path applies.

evidence_matrix.scenario: AI uses hand strength, phase, contract, trump, trick, whist, all-pass, and misere context rather than a generic first-action fallback.
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: src/ai/heuristicAi.ts scoreGameBid, scoreMisereBid, chooseOrderedContract, scoreDiscardPair, chooseWhistAction, scorePlayCard; src/ai/heuristicAi.test.ts non-first bidding/play-mode assertions
evidence_matrix.limitations: Heuristics are middle-strength deterministic rules, not search/simulation strength or exact MARRIAGE 3.30 AI reconstruction, which is explicitly out of MVP scope.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Across bidding, whist, contract play, all-pass, and misere states, requested AI decisions account for current phase and do not collapse to first legal action.
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: src/test/aiDecision.integration.test.ts scenario matrix; src/ai/heuristicAi.test.ts phase-aware assertions; npm run verify
evidence_matrix.limitations: Representative deterministic scenario coverage, not exhaustive behavioral snapshots for every legal action ordering.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Auto-turn harness uses chooseAiAction deterministically, checks chosen actions against legal actions before applyAction, and exposes deterministic smoke hooks.
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: src/test/integrationHarness.ts runDeterministicSmoke/assertLegalHarnessAction; src/test/integrationHarness.test.ts; npm run test -- src/ai/heuristicAi.test.ts src/test/aiDecision.integration.test.ts src/test/integrationHarness.test.ts
evidence_matrix.limitations: Harness smoke is deterministic in-process engine progression. It is not a browser e2e or live service flow because no such backend path exists.

evidence_matrix.scenario: No-legal-action and illegal auto-turn failures include seed, phase, actor, legal action set, chosen action, recent trace, and cause as applicable.
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: src/ai/heuristicAi.ts buildNoLegalActionsMessage; src/test/integrationHarness.ts buildHarnessFailureMessage; src/ai/heuristicAi.test.ts diagnostic assertion; src/test/aiDecision.integration.test.ts illegal harness diagnostic assertion; task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1150/attempt-1.json
evidence_matrix.limitations: Diagnostics are local thrown errors and test/development reproduction data; production telemetry is not part of the static MVP scope.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Classify US-843 evidence for a static browser app without backend/live API/auth/scope/server persistence.
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: PERSONAL-EP-180 hierarchy; package.json; dependency reports; source inspection; targeted tests; npm run verify
evidence_matrix.limitations: Evidence is local source review plus contract/unit, in-process integration, regression, and observability checks. live_api, live_browser, security, migration, and server persistence evidence are not applicable to this task scope.
